technology.title: Cybersecurity firm Check Point Software first-quarter profit beats estimates, cuts 2026 revenue outlook - Reuters
technology.summary: Cybersecurity firm Check Point Software first-quarter profit beats estimates, cuts 2026 revenue outlook Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Cybersecurity firm Check Point Software first-quarter profit beats estimates, cuts 2026 revenue outlook Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 網路安全公司Check Point Software在第一季度的獲利超出市場預期，但同時下調了2026年的營收預測。這一消息顯示出公司在當前市場環境中的挑戰與機會，儘管短期表現良好，長期展望卻顯示出不確定性。
briefing.background: Check Point Software是一家專注於網路安全的公司，隨著數位化進程加速，網路安全需求持續增長。然而，市場競爭激烈，許多新興公司和技術不斷湧現，可能對Check Point的市場份額造成壓力。公司在第一季度的獲利表現良好，顯示出其在當前環境中的適應能力，但下調2026年營收預測則可能反映出對未來市場需求的擔憂，特別是在全球經濟不確定性加大的背景下。
briefing.analysis: Check Point Software的第一季度獲利超出預期，顯示出其在短期內的業務韌性。然而，對2026年營收的下調預測可能引發市場對其長期增長潛力的質疑。此舉可能反映出公司對未來市場競爭的擔憂，尤其是在網路安全領域，隨著新技術的出現，傳統解決方案面臨挑戰。投資者可能會密切關注公司未來的策略調整和市場反應，以評估其在不斷變化的市場環境中的競爭力。

technology.title: Calls grow to ban Palantir in Australia after manifesto described by UK MP as ‘ramblings of a supervillain’
technology.summary: Spy tech firm says it’s just ‘a software company’ amid pressure for a ban on new contracts with government agencies Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast Just weeks after it implied some cultures are inferior to others in a manifesto described by one UK MP as the “ramblings of a supervillain” , the US spy tech company Palantir says it is just “a software company” amid calls for Australian government agencies to ban any new contracts with the controversial company. In Australia, state and federal contracts with Palantir have reached nearly $80m, and federal investment in the company is reportedly more than $160m. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Spy tech firm says it’s just ‘a software company’ amid pressure for a ban on new contracts with government agencies Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast Just weeks after it implied some cultures are inferior to others in a manifesto described by one UK MP as the “ramblings of a supervillain” , the US spy tech company Palantir says it is just “a software company” amid calls for Australian government agencies to ban any new contracts with the controversial company. In Australia, state and federal contracts with Palantir have reached nearly $80m, and federal investment in the company is reportedly more than $160m. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 澳大利亞對美國間諜科技公司Palantir的合約問題引發爭議，因為該公司最近在一份宣言中暗示某些文化優劣，遭到英國國會議員批評為「超級惡棍的胡言亂語」。在此背景下，澳大利亞政府機構面臨對Palantir新合約的禁令呼聲。據報導，澳大利亞與Palantir的合約總額接近8000萬澳元，聯邦對該公司的投資超過1.6億澳元。
briefing.background: Palantir是一家專注於數據分析和間諜技術的美國公司，近年來在全球範圍內擴展其業務。該公司在澳大利亞的業務增長迅速，與多個政府機構簽訂了合約，涉及公共安全和國防等領域。隨著對數據隱私和倫理的關注上升，Palantir的商業模式和道德立場受到越來越多的 scrutiny。特別是其最近的宣言引發了對其文化觀的質疑，進一步加劇了外界對其在政府部門角色的擔憂。
briefing.analysis: Palantir面臨的壓力主要來自於對其文化觀的批評，這可能影響其在澳大利亞的業務發展。政府機構的合約禁令呼聲反映了公眾對數據使用和倫理的高度敏感。雖然Palantir強調自己僅是一家軟體公司，但其與政府的密切合作關係使得其行為受到更嚴格的審視。若澳大利亞政府決定禁止與Palantir的新合約，將可能對該公司的營收造成影響，並促使其重新評估在其他市場的策略。此外，這一事件可能引發其他國家對Palantir的合約審查，進一步影響其全球業務。

technology.title: FCC chair says White House did not pressure him to open Disney review - Reuters
technology.summary: FCC chair says White House did not pressure him to open Disney review Reuters

briefing.news_focus: FCC chair says White House did not pressure him to open Disney review Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國聯邦通信委員會（FCC）主席表示，白宮並未對他施加壓力以開啟對迪士尼的審查。他的聲明旨在澄清外界對於政府干預FCC獨立性的疑慮，並強調FCC在進行相關審查時的自主性。
briefing.background: FCC負責監管美國的通信業務，包括廣播、電信和有線電視等領域。迪士尼作為一家大型媒體與娛樂公司，其業務運作受到FCC的監管。近期，隨著媒體合併與收購活動的增加，FCC的審查工作受到關注，特別是在政府對大型企業的監管立場日益強硬的背景下。這使得FCC的獨立性成為討論的焦點，尤其是在政治環境中，政府與監管機構的關係受到檢視。
briefing.analysis: FCC主席的聲明意在強調其機構的獨立性，這對於維護監管機構的公信力至關重要。隨著媒體行業的整合，政府對大型企業的監管將可能加強，這可能會引發更多的審查與討論。不同利益方，包括媒體公司、政策制定者及公眾，對於FCC的獨立性和透明度有不同的期待。媒體公司可能希望減少監管壓力，而政策制定者則可能支持更嚴格的監管以防止壟斷行為。未來，FCC如何平衡這些利益，將影響其決策及行業的發展。

politics.title: Watchdog weighs investigation into Farage’s undisclosed £5m gift
politics.summary: Electoral Commission reviewing whether Reform UK leader should have declared billionaire’s gift before entering parliament UK politics live – latest updates Analysis: Farage’s bid to get ahead of story only raises more questions The UK elections watchdog is considering whether to investigate an undisclosed £5m gift received by Nigel Farage before he announced his candidacy at the last general election. The move comes after the Guardian revealed this week that the Reform UK leader was given the money by the crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Electoral Commission reviewing whether Reform UK leader should have declared billionaire’s gift before entering parliament UK politics live – latest updates Analysis: Farage’s bid to get ahead of story only raises more questions The UK elections watchdog is considering whether to investigate an undisclosed £5m gift received by Nigel Farage before he announced his candidacy at the last general election. The move comes after the Guardian revealed this week that the Reform UK leader was given the money by the crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國選舉監察機構正在考慮是否對改革英國黨領袖尼格爾·法拉奇（Nigel Farage）未披露的500萬英鎊贈款展開調查。這筆贈款來自加密貨幣億萬富翁克里斯托弗·哈博恩（Christopher Harborne），法拉奇在上次大選宣布參選之前收到了這筆資金。此事引發了對法拉奇透明度的質疑，並可能影響其政治前景。
briefing.background: 在英國，選舉法要求候選人披露來自個人或組織的重大捐贈，以確保政治資金的透明度和公正性。法拉奇作為改革英國黨的領袖，其政治活動受到廣泛關注，尤其是在脫歐後的政治環境中。哈博恩的背景也引起了關注，因為他在加密貨幣領域的影響力可能使這筆贈款的來源和意圖受到質疑。這一事件的調查結果可能對英國政治的信任度產生深遠影響。
briefing.analysis: 法拉奇的未披露贈款問題引發了多方面的關注，尤其是選舉監察機構是否會對其進行調查。這一事件可能影響法拉奇的政治形象，並引發對其與哈博恩之間關係的進一步探討。支持者可能會認為這是對法拉奇的政治迫害，而反對者則可能利用此事質疑其誠信及透明度。此外，這一事件也可能引發對英國政治資金規範的更廣泛討論，特別是在加密貨幣捐贈的合法性和透明度方面。法拉奇的回應和選舉監察機構的最終決定將成為未來幾個月的重要觀察焦點。

politics.title: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
politics.summary: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.

briefing.news_focus: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 巴西國會批准了一項法案，顯著減少前總統哈伊爾·博爾索納羅的監禁刑期。博爾索納羅因在選舉失利後策劃政變而被判處27年監禁。這項法案的通過意味著博爾索納羅的刑期將大幅縮短，該法案目前等待巴西最高法院的確認。
briefing.background: 博爾索納羅在2022年選舉後因其支持者在巴西利亞襲擊國會大廈而受到廣泛譴責，隨後被判刑。現任總統盧拉·達席爾瓦在今年1月對該法案行使了否決權，這一舉動被視為對博爾索納羅及其支持者行為的強烈反對。巴西國會的這一決定反映了該國政治的深刻分歧，尤其是在保守派與進步派之間的緊張關係。
briefing.analysis: 巴西國會的這一決策顯示出保守派勢力在國會中的影響力，尤其是在博爾索納羅的支持者中。盧拉的否決被推翻，顯示出他在國會中的支持基礎相對薄弱。這一法案的通過可能會引發社會的強烈反彈，尤其是進步派和反對派的抗議活動。根據參考報導，該法案已經在國會和參議院獲得批准，現在等待最高法院的確認，這可能成為未來幾個月巴西政治的重要焦點。各方對於博爾索納羅的刑期減少持有不同看法，保守派認為這是對其政治迫害的糾正，而進步派則擔心這會削弱法治和民主的基礎。

supporting_titles: Brazil’s congress approves bill reducing prison sentence of former president Jair Bolsonaro
supporting_summaries: President Lula’s veto of the bill was overturned by Brazil’s congress and senate, meaning it now awaits confirmation by supreme court Brazil’s largely conservative congress has approved a bill reducing the prison sentence of the far-right former president Jair Bolsonaro, who was convicted last year of attempting a coup. The bill had initially been passed by congress in December, but President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva vetoed it in January in a symbolic move marking three years since Bolsonaro supporters ransacked the capital, Brasília. Continue reading...

politics.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 63 as Trump signals possible attacks
politics.summary: Iran’s president calls the US siege 'intolerable' as Donald Trump says war may resume.

briefing.news_focus: Iran’s president calls the US siege 'intolerable' as Donald Trump says war may resume.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗總統批評美國的封鎖行為為「無法忍受」，同時唐納德·特朗普表示可能會重新啟動戰爭，這是伊朗戰爭第63天的最新發展。特朗普的言論顯示出美國對於伊朗局勢的強硬立場，並可能預示著未來的軍事行動。
briefing.background: 自從伊朗與美國之間的緊張局勢升級以來，雙方的對抗行動不斷加劇。美國對伊朗的經濟制裁和軍事壓力使得伊朗的經濟受到嚴重影響，導致當地民眾的不滿情緒上升。特朗普的言論反映出他對於國內油價的關注，並暗示結束戰爭可能會帶來油價的下降，這對於美國選民來說是一個重要的議題。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的強硬立場可能會引發伊朗的反擊，進一步加劇地區緊張局勢。根據參考報導，特朗普提到結束戰爭後油價將會下降，這顯示出他對於經濟影響的考量，可能會影響他在國內的支持度。此外，特朗普還威脅要重新評估美國在歐洲的軍事存在，這可能是對於外界對美國在伊朗戰爭中角色的批評反應。不同報導中，特朗普對於美國軍事部署的態度有所不同，這可能反映出他在應對國內外壓力時的策略調整。

economy.title: NatWest faces £140m hit from Iran war as UK growth slows and inflation rises
economy.summary: Profits ahead of expectations but almost half of £283m impairment charge follows forecast reassessment Business live – latest updates NatWest said the economic fallout from the conflict in the Middle East could cost it £140m amid slowing growth and rising inflation even as it reported profits ahead of expectations. Overall, the FTSE 100 lender booked a £283m impairment charge and said that almost half of that was because of a reassessment of its economic forecast to “reflect increased geopolitical risk and weaker equity markets”. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Profits ahead of expectations but almost half of £283m impairment charge follows forecast reassessment Business live – latest updates NatWest said the economic fallout from the conflict in the Middle East could cost it £140m amid slowing growth and rising inflation even as it reported profits ahead of expectations. Overall, the FTSE 100 lender booked a £283m impairment charge and said that almost half of that was because of a reassessment of its economic forecast to “reflect increased geopolitical risk and weaker equity markets”. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: NatWest銀行預測因中東衝突將面臨1.4億英鎊的損失，這是在英國經濟增長放緩和通脹上升的背景下發生的。儘管該行的利潤超出預期，但仍錄得2.83億英鎊的減值費用，其中近一半是因為對經濟預測的重新評估，反映出地緣政治風險和股市疲軟的影響。
briefing.background: 隨著中東地區的衝突加劇，全球經濟面臨不確定性，特別是對於金融機構而言。英國的通脹率在衝突前已經上升，這使得英國央行在利率政策上面臨挑戰。NatWest的減值費用顯示出市場對未來經濟狀況的擔憂，尤其是在地緣政治風險加大的情況下。這些因素可能會影響投資者信心和消費者支出，進一步拖累經濟增長。
briefing.analysis: NatWest面臨的1.4億英鎊損失主要源於對經濟前景的重新評估，這顯示出銀行在應對不確定性方面的脆弱性。根據BBC的報導，英國央行已決定維持利率在3.75%，但隨著中東衝突的影響持續，未來可能會考慮加息以應對通脹壓力。這表明，銀行和央行之間在應對經濟挑戰時的政策協調至關重要。不同報導中，The Economist強調了通脹在衝突前已經上升的背景，這可能使得市場對央行的反應更加敏感。各方在應對經濟挑戰時的策略和立場可能會影響未來的市場走向。

supporting_titles: America’s next Fed chair is caught in a vice
Bank of England says rates could rise as Iran war fuels inflation
supporting_summaries: Inflation was heating up even before the war in Iran
The Bank of England voted to hold interest rates at 3.75% as it monitors the knock-on effects of the Middle East conflict.

economy.title: Trump to remove whisky tariffs after King's visit
economy.summary: The US president said he would lift restrictions on Scotland's ability to work with the state of Kentucky on whisky and bourbon.

briefing.news_focus: The US president said he would lift restrictions on Scotland's ability to work with the state of Kentucky on whisky and bourbon.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普宣布將解除對蘇格蘭威士忌的關稅限制，這將使蘇格蘭能夠與肯塔基州在威士忌和波本酒的合作上更加靈活。此舉可能是因應英國國王的訪問，旨在促進兩地之間的貿易關係。
briefing.background: 美國與蘇格蘭之間的貿易關係長期受到關稅政策的影響，特別是在威士忌和波本酒的進口上。特朗普政府曾因貿易不平衡問題對多個國家徵收關稅，這導致了國際貿易的緊張局勢。此次解除關稅的決定，可能是為了改善與英國的貿易關係，尤其是在英國脫歐後，尋求新的貿易機會。
stakeholders: 肯塔基州波本酒生產商
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的決定可能會受到多方利益的影響。對於蘇格蘭來說，解除關稅將有助於提升其威士忌的國際競爭力，並促進與肯塔基州的合作，這對於美國消費者來說也可能意味著更低的價格。然而，參考報導指出，特朗普政府的關稅政策對美國及其貿易夥伴造成了損害，這可能使其在國內外面臨壓力。各方對於解除關稅的看法可能存在分歧，部分經濟學者認為這是短期的政治策略，而非長期的經濟解決方案。

supporting_titles: Trump will not let the world move on from tariffs
supporting_summaries: Six charts show the damage to America, its trading partners and its consumers

economy.title: Why Bank kept interest rates on hold despite message for UK to brace itself for Trumpflation
economy.summary: The reasons are hardly comforting, pointing to the weakness of a battered economy in the face of this latest crisis Business live – latest updates Bank warns ‘higher inflation unavoidable’ after leaving interest rates on hold The message to the UK’s crisis-weary households from the Bank of England is: brace yourself for Trumpflation – and the higher interest rates it may yet take to rein it in. Reading the Bank’s quarterly monetary policy report, it is not difficult to understand the fury Rachel Reeves expressed while in Washington this month at the “folly” of the US president’s war on Iran – its economic consequences will hit the UK hard. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The reasons are hardly comforting, pointing to the weakness of a battered economy in the face of this latest crisis Business live – latest updates Bank warns ‘higher inflation unavoidable’ after leaving interest rates on hold The message to the UK’s crisis-weary households from the Bank of England is: brace yourself for Trumpflation – and the higher interest rates it may yet take to rein it in. Reading the Bank’s quarterly monetary policy report, it is not difficult to understand the fury Rachel Reeves expressed while in Washington this month at the “folly” of the US president’s war on Iran – its economic consequences will hit the UK hard. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國銀行決定維持利率不變，儘管面對美國總統特朗普的政策可能導致的通脹壓力。英國銀行在其季度貨幣政策報告中指出，未來的高通脹是不可避免的，並警告英國家庭要為即將到來的經濟挑戰做好準備。這一決定反映出英國經濟的脆弱性，特別是在特朗普對伊朗的政策可能引發的經濟後果下。
briefing.background: 目前，英國經濟正面臨多重挑戰，包括高通脹和全球市場的不穩定性。英國銀行的利率政策一直受到密切關注，因為利率的變動直接影響家庭和企業的借貸成本。隨著全球經濟形勢的變化，特別是美國的外交政策對其他國家的影響，英國經濟的脆弱性愈發明顯。特別是特朗普政府的政策可能導致的通脹，讓英國銀行不得不考慮未來的利率調整。
briefing.analysis: 英國銀行的決策反映了當前經濟環境的複雜性。維持利率不變可能是出於對經濟復甦的謹慎考量，但同時也顯示出對未來通脹壓力的擔憂。根據參考報導，DBS銀行警告伊朗戰爭可能帶來的二次影響，這與英國銀行的預測相呼應，表明國際局勢對英國經濟的潛在威脅。各方的立場顯示出對於如何應對這些挑戰的不同看法，英國銀行似乎更傾向於穩定現狀，而其他金融機構則可能對未來的風險持更為悲觀的態度。
